creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Yonas,

thanks for the patch! Since www/drupal6 has an expiration date i would prefer to have one for the modules too. Skipping the date could result in removing www/drupal6 while the modules are still available. 
Would you please update the patch? Drupal set the expiration date to: 
EXPIRATION_DATE=        2016-04-24

Thanks!
Torsten
